title: Sedgefield man to appear in court for former Plettenberg Bay detective’s murder
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The 53-year-old suspect arrested for the murder of former Plettenberg Bay detective Anneke 'Nicky' van Heerden (54) is expected to make his first court appearance in Plettenberg Bay today, Wednesday 21 January.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The 53-year-old suspect arrested for the murder of former Plettenberg Bay detective Anneke 'Nicky' van Heerden (54) is expected to make his first court appearance in Plettenberg Bay today, Wednesday 21 January."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The man, formerly from the Sedgefield/Wilderness area, was arrested earlier this week in connection with Van Heerden’s death."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It is believed that the suspect and Van Heerden were involved in a romantic relationship.","html":"It is believed that the suspect and Van Heerden were involved in a romantic relationship."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Van Heerden’s body was discovered at Rivertides near Keurbooms Beach on Sunday night, 18 January, after police responded to a report of a woman screaming.","html":"Van Heerden’s body was discovered at Rivertides near Keurbooms Beach on Sunday night, 18 January, after police responded to a report of a woman screaming."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more on sister publication, George Herald","html":"Read more on sister publication, George Herald"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Sedgefield man to appear in court for former Plettenberg Bay detective’s murder
